name: Cauliflower Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Par-boil cauliflower in a saucepan of boiling salted water for 4-5 minutes. Drain well.
2. In a bowl, mix together breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, and parsley. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Dip cauliflower flowerets in beaten egg.
4. Coat the flowerets in the breadcrumb mixture.
5. Place on a serving plate and set aside until ready to cook in hot oil.
6. To make cheese sauce, melt butter in a small saucepan. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat and add milk slowly. Bring to a boil, stirring, then simmer for 2 minutes.
8. Stir in mustard, Cheddar cheese, cayenne, and season with salt and pepper.
9. Serve hot.
